mapper.select:
select count(*) from functional_case where deleted = 0
and project_id = #{projectId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
select count(*) from test_plan_functional_case where test_plan_id = #{planId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and last_exec_result = 'PASS'
select count(*) from spotter_efficiency.test_plan_case_metrics where test_plan_id = #{planId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and first_exec_result is not null and first_exec_result = 'PASS'
select id from functional_case where project_id = #{projectId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and deleted = 0
select count(*) from functional_case where create_user = #{userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and deleted = 0

select tpcm.case_id, fc.name as case_name, sum(tpcm.exec_count) as exec_count, sum(tpcm.total_time_ms) as total_duration, COALESCE(cmd.cs_score, 0) as cs_score, cmd.complexity_level from spotter_efficiency.test_plan_case_metrics tpcm left join spotter_efficiency.case_metrics_detail cmd on tpcm.case_id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci = cmd.case_id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci left join spotter_metersphere.functional_case fc on tpcm.case_id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci = fc.id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci where fc.create_user = #{userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and tpcm.create_time >= #{startTime,jdbcType=BIGINT} and tpcm.create_time <= #{endTime,jdbcType=BIGINT} group by tpcm.case_id, fc.name, cmd.cs_score, cmd.complexity_level having sum(tpcm.exec_count) >= #{threshold,jdbcType=INTEGER} order by exec_count desc

select distinct cmd.case_id from spotter_efficiency.case_metrics_detail cmd inner join functional_case fc on cmd.case_id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci = fc.id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci where fc.create_user = #{userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and fc.deleted = 0
select distinct create_user from functional_case where deleted = 0 and create_user is not null and create_user != ''
select id from functional_case where deleted = 0 order by create_time asc
select id from functional_case where project_id = #{projectId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and deleted = 0 order by create_time asc
select distinct project_id from functional_case where deleted = 0 and project_id is not null
select count(*) from spotter_efficiency.case_metrics_detail

select case_id as caseId, cs_score as csScore, complexity_level as complexityLevel, algo_expected_write_ms as algoExpectedWriteMs, algo_expected_exec_ms as algoExpectedExecMs, platform_actual_write_ms as platformActualWriteMs from spotter_efficiency.case_metrics_detail where case_id in
#{caseId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
select case when tp.type = 'GROUP' then tp.id else tp.group_id end from spotter_aegis.test_plan tp where tp.id = #{planId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} limit 1

select count(distinct tpfc.functional_case_id) from test_plan_functional_case tpfc inner join spotter_aegis.test_plan tp on tpfc.test_plan_id = tp.id where (tp.group_id = #{groupId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and tp.type = 'TEST_PLAN') or tp.id = #{groupId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

select count(distinct tpfc.functional_case_id) from test_plan_functional_case tpfc inner join spotter_aegis.test_plan tp on tpfc.test_plan_id = tp.id inner join spotter_efficiency.test_plan_case_metrics tpcm on tpcm.test_plan_id = tpfc.test_plan_id and tpcm.case_id = tpfc.functional_case_id where ((tp.group_id = #{groupId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and tp.type = 'TEST_PLAN') or tp.id = #{groupId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) and (tpcm.case_source_type = 'NEW' or tpcm.case_source_type is null)
